{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Knight of The Last Horizon
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Raion]] identifies himself as the [[Knight of The Last Horizon]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28">''The Knight'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“As the…Kn-Knight of The Lassst…Horizon, I…challenge you.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
